author: ndokutovich
name: SP8192 + 3-Layer Depth Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + EMA + QK5.25 + Pre-Quant AdamW TTT (10ep, freeze-1)
blurb: Tuned variant: QK-Gain 5.25, pre-quant TTT with 10 epochs (lr=0.00045, freeze 1 block, cosine decay). Base: PR #1471 (11L, 512dim, GQA 8/4, squared LeakyReLU, MuonEq-R) with 3-layer depth recurrence (layers 3,4,5), parallel residuals from layer 7, EMA 0.9965, skip gates. TTT technique from PR #1423. SDClip GPTQ int6 + brotli. Track A: no eval-time adaptation.
